summary: A short stock B-roll intro (warehouse forklift workers, a MAGA-hat rally crowd) cuts quickly into sustained static footage of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling delivering Senate hearing testimony about the FY2027 DOL budget and the American workforce. It is a lightly-edited narrated speech/hearing clip, dominated by talking-head testimony with no music track or genre styling, so it is not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: Hon. Keith Sonderling, Acting Secretary, Department of Labor
